title: Gama-Senn

{{Quote|Excellency, the Gama system gives full allegiance to the Empire. The Gama-Senn people accept your will as absolute, my Emperor.|The Gama-Senn ruler, after witnessing the Galaxy Gun in use|<ref name="EE1" />}}
The '''Gama-Senn''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Gama system/Legends|Gama system]]. Gama-Senn had two thumbs per [[Limb/Legends|hand]] and flat facial features. In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the [[Unidentified Gama-Senn ruler|Gama-Senn ruler]] was convinced to swear the Gama [[Star system/Legends|system's]] loyalties to the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] after a demonstration of the [[Dark Empire]]'s [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[Galaxy Gun]]. Palpatine scoffed at the Gama-Senn representative for withholding allegiance until swayed by fear.

==Biology and appearance==
The Gama-Senn were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] with [[Limb/Legends|hands]] distinguished by at least four digits each, two of which were thumbs. At least one member of the [[Species/Legends|species]] had [[Color/Legends|yellowish-brown]] skin; large, rounded [[Ear/Legends|ears]]; and forward-oriented [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] with white sclera. The Gama-Senn mouth was large, with prominent facial muscles around the lips, and the nose was small and barely extended from the face.<ref name="EE1" />

==Society and culture==
The Gama-Senn inhabited the [[Gama system/Legends|Gama system]],<ref name="CSWE I 317" /> located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EA 12">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the entire [[Star system/Legends|system]] fell under the rule of a single individual.<ref name="CSWE I 317" /> On at least one occasion in 11 ABY, the [[Unidentified Gama-Senn ruler|ruler]] wore clothing that consisted of a violet ensemble with tails, shoes, and orange [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]]. The Gama-Senn leader also wore a maroon headband, tied at the left side of the head.<ref name="EE1" />

==History==
{{Quote|Why should I accept your slavish obeisances? I am well aware your planet has withheld allegiance until now, when you have seen the power of my galaxy weapon. I can easily annihilate your world and all its inhabitants— ''Unh''… just… as I obliterated that… Rebel troopship!|Palpatine reacts to the Gama-Senn ruler's attempt to swear the Gama system's fealty|<ref name="EE1" />}}
[[File:PalpatineGamaSennRuler-EmpiresEnd1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The reborn Emperor Palpatine scolded the ruler of Gama-Senn for swearing loyalty to the Dark Empire only out of fear.]]
The Gama-Senn originated from a [[Unidentified planet (Gama system)|homeworld]] in the Gama system.<ref name="CSWE I 317" /> The world became integrated into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at some point between [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000]] and [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]] as part of the [[Southern Core]] region of the Core Worlds. The species' home system fell within territory controlled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] from [[1004 BBY|1004]] to [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], during the [[New Sith Wars]]. The system remained within Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="EA 12" />

After the rebirth of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] into a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the Gama-Senn remained unaligned with the [[Dark Empire]].<ref name="EE1" /> However, the ruler of the species' home system<ref name="CSWE I 317" /> joined other [[Diplomat/Legends|delegates]] on a visit to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] throneworld, [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], to behold the power of the Empire's new [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[Galaxy Gun]]. After witnessing the weapon destroy the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|troopship]] ''[[Pelagia]]'' with a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] launched through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]—an event broadcast to Byss via [[subminiature probe drone]]s—the Gama-Senn leader submitted to the might of the Dark Empire. Nevertheless, the Gama-Senn's acquiescence merely angered Palpatine, who disdained the species for only capitulating due to fear.<ref name="EE1" /> By [[137 ABY]], the Gama-Senn's home system had fallen within a domain known as the [[Core Worlds Security Zone]], part of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="EA 12" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Gama-Senn first appeared [[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[Jim Baikie]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="EE1" /> on [[October 24]], [[1995]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54211/star_wars_empires_end_1995_1|text=Star Wars: Empire's End (1995) #1}}</ref>
